allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const p = 'src/pages/[locale]/regions/[slug].astro'; const c = fs.readFileSync\(p, 'utf8'\); const importLine = c.match\(/import.*RegionDetail/\); console.log\(importLine?.[0]\); const exists = fs.existsSync\('src/pages/regiones/RegionDetail.scss'\); console.log\('SCSS exists:', exists\);")

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\ebell\\Documents\\nuna terra peru\\nuna-terra-astro"; Get-ChildItem "dist" -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Extension -eq ".css" } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 10)
PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\ebell\\Documents\\nuna terra peru\\nuna-terra-astro"; Get-ChildItem "dist" -Recurse | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })
